name: ASRock A620AI WiFi Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Gigabit LAN - 802.11axe Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2 (A620AI WIFI)
